title: The VALIS Trilogy — Page 448
raw_text:
was wrong, and this is a terrible realization, a matter that should incite moral
and spiritual dread. It does that, in me, now; but it did not then; my dread
came too late; it came as hindsight.
This may be tiresome prattle to you, but it is something else to me: it is my
heart’s despair.
